# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Brianna Betances
A young actor seeking to establish their professional presence online, showcasing their talent, experience, and versatility to industry professionals who can offer casting opportunities and representation.

## Target Audience
casting directors, agents, producers

## Industry
entertainment
